nasb.text: But because of immoralities, each man is to have his own wife, and each woman is to have her own husband.

esv.text: But because of the temptation to sexual immorality, each man should have his own wife and each woman her own husband.

cnv.text: 但為了避免淫亂的事，男人應當各有自己的妻子，女人也應當各有自己的丈夫。

ccb.text: 不过，为了避免发生淫乱的事，男婚女嫁也合情合理。

csbs.text: 不过为了避免淫乱的事，每个男人都应当有自己的妻子，每个女人也应当有自己的丈夫。
